ddls:
CREATE TABLE "server_performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count representing an index or occurrence of the log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the servers table */,
  "directory" TEXT /* Directory where the performance logs are stored */,
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the performance counters table */,
  "file" TEXT /* File associated with the performance counter log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* The value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of the metric value */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the applications table */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* The log level (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of server (e.g., web server, database server) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version running on the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the server */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the server's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "application_version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the application's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_counters" (
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance counter */,
  "counter_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance counter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the counter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the counter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the counter's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
